title: Incorrect query result
description:
## Bug Report

Please answer these questions before submitting your issue. Thanks!

### 1. Minimal reproduce step (Required)

<!-- a step by step guide for reproducing the bug. -->
```sql
CREATE TABLE t1 (c1 VARCHAR(50));
INSERT INTO t1 (c1) VALUES ('2001-01-32');
SELECT c1 as r1 FROM t1 WHERE !((MAKEDATE(2001,31) IN (SELECT c1 FROM t1))); -- actual: {}, expected: {2001-01-32}
```
### 2. What did you expect to see? (Required)
{2001-01-32} should be returned.
### 3. What did you see instead (Required)
{} was returned.
### 4. What is your TiDB version? (Required)

<!-- Paste the output of SELECT tidb_version() -->
Release Version: v8.5.1
Edition: Community
Git Commit Hash: fea86c8e35ad4a86a5e1160701f99493c2ee547c
Git Branch: HEAD
UTC Build Time: 2025-01-16 07:38:34
GoVersion: go1.23.4
Race Enabled: false
Check Table Before Drop: false
Store: tikv
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t2 (c1 DATE, c2 VARCHAR(50));
SELECT c2 FROM t2 WHERE c1 = DATE '2001-01-32' OR c2 IS NULL;
SELECT c2 FROM t2 WHERE NOT (c1 IN (SELECT c1 FROM t2 WHERE c2 = '2001-01-32'));
SELECT c2 FROM t2 WHERE c1 = DATE '2001-01-31' AND c2 = '2001-01-32';
key_bug_features: Incorrect handling of date formats in SQL queries
